name: OpenCode AI
description: Installs OpenCode AI agent and configures it for use in GitHub Codespaces. Supports CLI, TUI and Web UI with persistent session data under /workspaces.

version.description: Version of OpenCode to install. Use 'latest' or a specific semver tag (e.g. '0.3.12').

webPort.description: Port on which the OpenCode web UI will be exposed.

startWebOnCreate.description: If true, adds a postStartCommand that automatically starts the OpenCode web UI.

dataDirRelative.description: Path relative to the workspace folder where OpenCode stores sessions, snapshots and logs. Kept under /workspaces so it survives container rebuilds.
